languages.text: "Заберите отсюда этих выскочек и всыпьте им плетей. Пусть знают, что единственная привелегерованная персона на этом корабле — это я".
"Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."
languages.original_text: "Заберите отсюда этих выскочек и всыпьте им плетей. Пусть знают, что единственная привелегерованная персона на этом корабле — это я".

traits.locale_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."
"Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."
"Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

languages.text: 「この生意気な奴らを連れて行って、こらしめてやれ。そうすれば、この船では俺だけが特権を持つことを学んでくれるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

languages.text: "Bu sonradan görmeleri buradan çıkarıp kırbaçlatın. Bu, onlara bu gemide ayrıcalıklı olan tek kişinin ben olduğumu öğretecektir."
languages.original_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

traits.locale_text: "Bu sonradan görmeleri buradan çıkarıp kırbaçlatın. Bu, onlara bu gemide ayrıcalıklı olan tek kişinin ben olduğumu öğretecektir."

languages.text: “把这些无礼之徒带出去处以鞭刑。让他们明白，在这艘船上，只有我能享有特权。”
languages.original_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

traits.locale_text: “把这些无礼之徒带出去处以鞭刑。让他们明白，在这艘船上，只有我能享有特权。”

languages.text: "Schafft diese Emporkömmlinge hier aus und lasst sie auspeitschen. Das wird sie lehren, dass auf diesem Schiff niemand außer mir Privilegien genießt."
languages.original_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

traits.locale_text: "Schafft diese Emporkömmlinge hier aus und lasst sie auspeitschen. Das wird sie lehren, dass auf diesem Schiff niemand außer mir Privilegien genießt."

languages.text: « Qu'on embarque ces parvenus et qu'on leur donne le fouet. Ça leur apprendra qu'à bord de ce vaisseau, la seule personne qui ait doit à un traitement de faveur, c'est moi. »
languages.original_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

traits.locale_text: « Qu'on embarque ces parvenus et qu'on leur donne le fouet. Ça leur apprendra qu'à bord de ce vaisseau, la seule personne qui ait doit à un traitement de faveur, c'est moi. »

languages.text: «Llévese a estos advenedizos y haga que los flagelen. Así aprenderán que en esta nave la única persona que disfruta de trato preferente soy yo».
languages.original_text: "Take these upstarts out of here and have them flogged. That will teach them that, on this ship, the only person with preferential privileges is me."

traits.locale_text: «Llévese a estos advenedizos y haga que los flagelen. Así aprenderán que en esta nave la única persona que disfruta de trato preferente soy yo».
